meta.source: FRED DFII5/7/10/20/30 live close 2024-01-02 (verified Sprint 2 via FredConnector.fetch_yield_curve_linker; 0.00 bps delta vs FRED H.15 archive). Sibling of us_2024_01_02 (DGS* nominal).
meta.note: 5 TIPS tenors → 4-param NS reduced fit (LINKER_MIN_OBSERVATIONS=5; n_obs<MIN_OBSERVATIONS_FOR_SVENSSON=9). Sprint 2 spec §7 row 9 target real_10Y ≈ 0.0185 ± 15 bps holds against actual FRED DFII10=0.0174 (drift 11 bps, within tolerance).
